description_long: This vase features a bulbous, rounded body with a gently fluted surface that spirals from the base to the opening, creating a dynamic, organic appearance. The opening is scalloped, forming a flower-like rim that adds a decorative touch and visual interest. The body tapers smoothly toward a narrower neck before flaring out again at the mouth, giving the vase an elegant silhouette. The surface appears matte and unglazed, with a soft off-white or light beige coloration, suggesting it is made from ceramic or porcelain. There are no visible handles or additional adornments, emphasizing the sculptural quality of the fluted pattern. The overall design is modern yet timeless, suitable for both contemporary and classic urban settings.
description: A fluted, scallop-rimmed vase with a bulbous body and matte off-white ceramic finish, featuring a modern organic silhouette.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the scalloped, flower-like rim and the circular opening.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, bulbous body and the smooth, spiraling fluted pattern.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view revealing the wide, scalloped mouth and the hollow interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the continuous fluted surface and the gentle taper toward the neck.
